title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.630 - Clerk, when liable to civil action
text:
545.630.  Clerk, when liable to civil action. — If any clerk of the court shall neglect or refuse to perform any duty in relation to the removal of a cause enjoined on him by the foregoing provisions, he shall forfeit and pay a sum not exceeding five hundred dollars, to be recovered by civil action, in the name and to the use of the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 4035) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3646; 1919 § 3989; 1909 § 5196
